title: APM: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Attack Detection
description: Detects XSS attack payloads in HTTP URLs and query parameters captured by OCI APM and OpenTelemetry. Covers reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS including script injection, event handlers, and javascript: URIs.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%3Cscript%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%3C/script%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%3Csvg%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%3Ciframe%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%onerror=%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%onload=%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%onmouseover=%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%javascript:%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%javascript%3A%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%document.cookie%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%document.write%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%eval(%') | stats count as Attacks by 'HTTP URL', 'HTTP Method', 'User Agent', 'Client IP', 'service.name' | sort -Attacks
falsepositives: Security scanning tools during authorized testing
